Affordable monthly rentals

Furnish your space without the heavy upfront cost.

RentEase offers flexible monthly plans for furniture, appliances, and relocation-friendly essentials for students and professionals.

  • Flexible tenures from 1 to 12 months

Why RentEase?

24/7 Support
100+ Products
4.8/5 Rated service

Platform goals

Built for urban living and easy relocation

Affordable plans

Choose budget-friendly rental options for essentials without long-term ownership.

Easy relocation

Move cities without worrying about transporting bulky furniture or appliances.

Fast support

Raise maintenance requests and receive quick assistance throughout your rental period.

Popular rentals

Featured furniture and appliances

User journey

Simple from browse to return

1. Select

Pick your furniture or appliance and choose the best rental tenure.

2. Schedule

Choose a delivery date, location, and a pickup slot that matches your plan.

3. Enjoy & return

Use the items during your rental period and extend or return them effortlessly.

RentEase © 2026 • Designed for modern renters and growing cities.
